_comment: Template config for multicam-podcast-clipper. Copy this to <project_root>/10_WORK/multicam_config.json and tune per-project. Episode paths are relative to project_root. Music folder + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY are read from env / global. Per-brand crops/colors/music vibes live in brand memory (e.g. project_client_podcast_shorts_2026-06-05.md), not here.
context: Two-person podcast (host + guest) — punchy conversational segments. Host carries the bulk of the talk; guest lands the contrast / punchline. Quotes / role-play / 'say this' lines render italic + yellow.

host._role: the brand talent / primary speaker. Caption color = white (default_voice in spice preset).

guest._role: the secondary speaker. Caption color = yellow #FECB00 (voice_spans 'guest' tag).
